headline: GE HealthCare to announce first quarter 2026 results on April 29, 2026
summary: CHICAGO, April 06, 2026--GE HealthCare (Nasdaq: GEHC) will announce its first quarter 2026 financial results before the market opens on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. The GE HealthCare management team will also host a conference call and webcast at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time / 7:30 a.m. Central Time on that same day, which will be a live webcast and accessible at https://investor.gehealthcare.com/news-events/events.
